events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: field-bending anchor bolts to force fit-up is a non-compliant, out-of-tolerance condition under AISC 303 (no engineer-approved repair detail, risk of concrete cracking and reduced anchorage capacity) and a life-safety concern under OSHA 1926 Subpart R — decision is `fail`, risk `high`, with the column's anchorage requiring EOR review before erection proceeds.
